title: poa kirkii var. mackayi
intro: Poa kirkii var. mackayi, commonly known as Kirk's fescue, is a type of grass native to New Zealand. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma due to its anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Poa kirkii var. mackayi include relief from congestion and coughing, as well as soothing effects on the respiratory system. It can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for consumption, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
